title: Passion.
content:
The wine-loud laughter of indulged Desire
    Upon his lips, and, in his eyes, the fire
    Of uncontrol, he takes in reckless hands, - 
    And interrupts with discords, - the sad lyre
    Of LOVE'S deep soul, and never understands.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Passion.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
